name: Endeavour Silver Corp.
description: Endeavour Silver Corp. is a mid-tier silver producer operating three mines: the Guanaceví and Terronera mines in Mexico and the Kolpa mine in Peru. Terronera, which achieved commercial production in late 2024, is expected to become the company's flagship operation and drives 2026 guidance of 14.6 to 15.6 million silver equivalent ounces across all three mines. The company is also advancing a pipeline of exploration projects in Mexico, Chile, and the United States.
